properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Reya is not unlocked with this skin. Reya can only be unlocked by completing Reya Reborn - the second Variant of the Idyllglen adventure in the Descent into Avernus Campaign.

fullName.display: 蕾雅·曼特尔芒，扎瑞尔的化身

backstory.original: Born in the land of Turmish, Reya came to the holy city of Elturel to train as a Hellrider when she was twelve. As a faithful follower of Torm, Reya trained to sacrifice herself for the greater good. That preparation led to her taking Zariel's sword and joining the Champions, after rescuing the city of Elturel from Avernus.
backstory.display: 蕾雅出生在突米斯的土地上，她在 12 岁时来到圣城艾尔托瑞尔，受训成为一名地狱骑士。作为托姆的忠实追随者，蕾雅的训练让她能够为大局而牺牲自己。这种精神使她在从阿弗纳斯救下艾尔托瑞尔城之后，接过了扎瑞尔的剑，加入了勇士们。

description.original: Reya leaps out and slashes at a random enemy, cleaving nearby enemies as well.
description.display: 蕾雅跳起并劈砍一名随机敌人，同时顺劈附近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Reya leaps out and slashes at a random enemy with the Sword of Zariel, cleaving nearby enemies as well.
longDescription.display: 蕾雅跳起用扎瑞尔之剑劈砍一名随机敌人，同时顺劈附近的敌人。

description.original: Lulu puts all enemies to sleep for 10 seconds, then, Reya swings her sword in a massive circle.
description.display: 露露使所有敌人沉睡 10 秒，随后蕾雅用剑挥出一个大圆环。

longDescription.original: Reya launches to the sky, she lands by SLAMMING the Sword of Zariel into the ground with a shockwave summoning Zariel and her friend Lulu. While Reya communes with Zariel, Lulu zips around the board, putting all enemies to sleep for 10 seconds. While the enemies are asleep and Reya remains in her pose, the Champions deal massive damage against them. When the 10 seconds is complete, Reya removes the sword and swings it in a massive circle.
longDescription.display: 蕾雅跳到空中，下落时用扎瑞尔之剑猛击地面制造震荡波，并召唤出扎瑞尔和她的好友露露。在蕾雅与扎瑞尔交流时，露露会迅速在战场上穿梭，使所有敌人沉睡 10 秒。敌人入睡和蕾雅保持不动时，勇士可对敌人造成高额伤害。10 秒后，蕾雅会收回剑并使出大范围圆环形斩击。

description.desc: Reya imbues adjacent Champions with her Searing Radiance, causing their attacks to deal $(amount)% more damage.
蕾雅用灼热光辉灌注相邻勇士，使他们的攻击伤害提高 $(amount)%。
Fiends become Reya's Favored Foe and take $(amount)% more damage from Reya and adjacent champions.
炼狱生物成为蕾雅的偏好对手，蕾雅与相邻勇士对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

description.pre: The gaze of Zariel turns from Reya and sweeps across the formation, looking at a random number of unique champions before returning to Reya. Once it returns to Reya it increases the effect of Searing Radiance by $(amount)% for each Champion it looked at, including Reya, stacking multiplicatively.
扎瑞尔的目光脱离蕾雅并扫过整个阵型，在转回蕾雅身上之前注视随机数量的勇士。当它继续开始注视蕾雅时，每注视过一名勇士（包括蕾雅），提升灼热光辉的效果 $(amount)%。以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: The gaze of Zariel passes over champions, the more it visits prior to Reya the higher the bonus to her buffs.
tipText.display: 扎瑞尔的目光笼罩勇士。蕾雅前方的目光落点越多，她的增益就越强。

description.desc: All Lawful aligned Champions' damage is increased by $(amount)%. All Good aligned Champions' damage is increased by $(amount)%.
所有守序阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。所有善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Reya buffs Good and Lawful Champions more than any other.
tipText.display: 蕾雅对善良和守序勇士的强化比其他勇士更多。

description.desc: Echoes of Zariel is guaranteed to look at all Good aligned Champions in the formation before returning to Reya.
回到蕾雅身上之前，扎瑞尔的回声会注视阵型中所有的善良阵营勇士

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: The gaze of Zariel focuses on Good aligned Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 扎瑞尔的目光击中在善良勇士身上。

description.desc: Echoes of Zariel is guaranteed to look at all Lawful aligned Champions in the formation before returning to Reya.
回到蕾雅身上之前，扎瑞尔的回声会注视阵型中所有的守序阵营勇士

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: The gaze of Zariel focuses on Lawful aligned Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 扎瑞尔的目光击中在守序勇士身上。

name.display: 强化阵型技能 2：叠层前（仅专长）

description.original: I'm a Hellrider, it's what I do.
description.display: 我是地狱骑士，这是我该做的事。

description.original: Avernus changed me, to the core of who I am.
description.display: 是阿弗纳斯让我脱胎换骨变了一个人。

description.original: We have the Angel Zariel watching us.
description.display: 天使扎瑞尔在守护着我们。

description.original: Zariel has blessed us with much.
description.display: 扎瑞尔赐福了我们。

description.original: Zariel has warned me. Our trials are not yet complete.
description.display: 扎瑞尔预警过我。我们面临的考验还没结束。

description.original: She always has our back.
description.display: 她永远会守护着我们。

description.original: It's a ceremonial title, but... I like it.
description.display: 虽然只是个虚名头衔，但是......我挺喜欢的。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack bonus of Echoes of Zariel by $amount%.

description.original: I am her mercy. I am her wrath. I am all that she was, is, and will be.
description.display: 我即她之仁慈，我即她之愤怒。她之过去、现在与未来皆归于我身。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack bonus of Echoes of Zariel by $amount%.

description.original: Out of darkness comes the light.
description.display: 光明突破黑暗。

description.original: Tiamat has come. We're working on a plan to lure her from the city.
description.display: 提亚马特来了。我们正在想办法把她引出城。

effects.description: Reya may be used in any Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus adventure or variant when a patron is enabled, even if the patron or variant restrictions would normally restrict her.

description.original: I was 12 when I swore an oath to Elturel, and the Hellriders.
description.display: 我向艾尔托瑞尔和地狱骑士宣誓时，我才12岁。

description.original: I'm still the same girl, just with a larger purpose.
description.display: 我还是那个女孩，只是有了一个更大的目标。

description.original: Even without the Companion, Elturel will always be protected.
description.display: 即使没有伙伴，艾尔托瑞尔也会一直被守护着。

description.original: There is more than one city. With the Champions, I can defend them all.
description.display: 城市不止一座。有了勇士队，我能守卫所有城市。

description.original: My constant companion for almost a decade.
description.display: 近十年来一直陪伴着我。

description.original: Fiends eventually realized that getting in my way was a bad idea.
description.display: 炼狱生物终于意识到了挡我的路不是个好主意。

description.original: Yael blessed us with knowledge when we needed it most.
description.display: 当我们最需要知识的时候，雅艾尔赐予了我们。

description.original: Zariel trusted me with this ancient blade. I pray I do her justice.
description.display: 扎瑞尔把这把古老的剑托付给了我。我祈求我对她公正。

description.original: You'd be surprised how quickly it gets dirty!
description.display: 它变脏的速度会让你吃惊！

description.original: Good for defending against the hordes of Avernus, not so great for rubble removal.
description.display: 很适合用来抵御阿弗纳斯的敌群，但用来清除碎石效果就不太好。

description.original: When I took the sword... I understood. Finally.
description.display: 当我拿起那把剑......我终于明白了。

description.original: I am Reya Mantlemorn, Avatar of Zariel. You'll probably want to back down.
description.display: 我叫蕾雅·曼特尔芒，是扎瑞尔的化身。你也许会想退下。

description.original: Memories of Lulu help me sleep at night.
description.display: 关于露露在晚上助我入眠的回忆。

description.original: Lulu's trumpet sound was my only clue to the Champions' location in Avernus.
description.display: 露露的小号声是我知道勇士队在阿弗纳斯的位置的唯一线索。

description.original: Lulu is a rare thing; A true friend. She always has my back.
description.display: 露露是很稀有的存在；真正的朋友。她总是支持我。

description.original: I try not to call for her while in cramped quarters... We learned that lesson the hard way.
description.display: 在狭窄的房间里，我尽量不叫她......这是我们付出惨痛代价后学到的教训。

description.original: I feel something pulling us to the east. A mountain... on fire?
description.display: 我感觉有东西在把我们往东边拉。一座山......着火了？

description.original: The Hellriders have taken up the the task of providing stability to the survivors.
description.display: 地狱骑士承担了为幸存者提供安稳的任务。

description.original: That place held the happiest of memories prior to the fall. Now it reminds me of my trials.
description.display: 那个地方曾承载着坠落前最幸福的回忆。现在它让我想起了我的试炼。

description.original: I put it on the wall in Trollskull. A reminder of where I've been.
description.display: 我把它挂在巨魔头骨的墙上。它能让我记得我去过的地方。

description.original: When you collect hundreds of feathers, you can make a really comfy pillow!
description.display: 当你收集了成百上千根羽毛，你就可以做一个非常舒服的枕头了！

description.original: A key spell component for Feather Fall.
description.display: 咒术“羽毛飘落”的关键施法用具。

description.original: It's from Idyllglen. When I returned with it, I knew Zariel had chosen me.
description.display: 它来自伊迪尔格伦。当我带着它回来时，我就知道扎瑞尔选择了我。

description.original: A gift. From my friend.
description.display: 一份礼物。我的朋友送的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Born in the land of Turmish, Reya came to the holy city of Elturel to train as a Hellrider when she was twelve. As a faithful follower of Torm, Reya trained to sacrifice herself for the greater good. That preparation led to her taking Zariel's sword and joining the Champions, after rescuing the city of Elturel from Avernus.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Reya buffs the DPS of adjacent, Lawful and Good Champions.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Reya is not unlocked with this skin. Reya can only be unlocked by completing Reya Reborn - the second Variant of the Idyllglen adventure in the Descent into Avernus Campaign.

character_sheet_details.full_name: 蕾雅·曼特尔芒，扎瑞尔的化身
character_sheet_details.backstory: 蕾雅出生在突米斯的土地上，她在 12 岁时来到圣城艾尔托瑞尔，受训成为一名地狱骑士。作为托姆的忠实追随者，蕾雅的训练让她能够为大局而牺牲自己。这种精神使她在从阿弗纳斯救下艾尔托瑞尔城之后，接过了扎瑞尔的剑，加入了勇士们。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 蕾雅能够强化相邻的伤害输出者、守序阵营和善良阵营的勇士。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士蕾雅不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“蕾雅的重生”——“坠入阿弗纳斯”战役中“伊迪尔格伦”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁蕾雅。

effects.description: 启用赞助者时，蕾雅可用于任何博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯冒险或支线任务，即便赞助者或支线任务的限制条件在通常情况下会限制她参加，她也可以参加。

display.name: 地狱骑士徽章
display.description: 即使没有伙伴，艾尔托瑞尔也会一直被守护着。

original.name: Retired Badge of the Hellrider
original.description: There is more than one city. With the Champions, I can defend them all.

display.name: 退役地狱骑士徽章
display.description: 城市不止一座。有了勇士队，我能守卫所有城市。

original.name: Hellrider Blade
original.description: My constant companion for almost a decade.

display.name: 地狱骑士之刃
display.description: 近十年来一直陪伴着我。

original.name: Ichor-Covered Blade
original.description: Fiends eventually realized that getting in my way was a bad idea.

display.name: 覆盖着脓水的利刃
display.description: 炼狱生物终于意识到了挡我的路不是个好主意。

original.name: The Bleeding Citadel's Prize
original.description: Yael blessed us with knowledge when we needed it most.

display.name: 流血堡垒的奖赏
display.description: 当我们最需要知识的时候，雅艾尔赐予了我们。

original.name: The Sword of Zariel
original.description: Zariel trusted me with this ancient blade. I pray I do her justice.

display.name: 扎瑞尔之剑
display.description: 扎瑞尔把这把古老的剑托付给了我。我祈求我对她公正。

original.name: Mucked-Up Armor
original.description: You'd be surprised how quickly it gets dirty!

display.name: 脏兮兮的盔甲
display.description: 它变脏的速度会让你吃惊！

original.name: Hellrider Fatigues
original.description: Good for defending against the hordes of Avernus, not so great for rubble removal.

display.name: 地狱骑士的军服
display.description: 很适合用来抵御阿弗纳斯的敌群，但用来清除碎石效果就不太好。

original.name: Zariel's Holy Armor
original.description: When I took the sword... I understood. Finally.

display.name: 扎瑞尔的神圣护甲
display.description: 当我拿起那把剑......我终于明白了。

original.name: Armor of the Avatar
original.description: I am Reya Mantlemorn, Avatar of Zariel. You'll probably want to back down.

display.name: 化身护甲
display.description: 我叫蕾雅·曼特尔芒，是扎瑞尔的化身。你也许会想退下。

original.name: Trumpet of my Dreams
original.description: Memories of Lulu help me sleep at night.

display.name: 我梦想的小号
display.description: 关于露露在晚上助我入眠的回忆。

original.name: Lulu's Far-Off Trumpet
original.description: Lulu's trumpet sound was my only clue to the Champions' location in Avernus.

display.name: 露露遥远的小号
display.description: 露露的小号声是我知道勇士队在阿弗纳斯的位置的唯一线索。

original.name: Lulu the Hollyphant
original.description: Lulu is a rare thing; A true friend. She always has my back.

display.name: 圣飞象露露
display.description: 露露是很稀有的存在；真正的朋友。她总是支持我。

original.name: Lulu the Mammoth
original.description: I try not to call for her while in cramped quarters... We learned that lesson the hard way.

display.name: 长毛象露露
display.description: 在狭窄的房间里，我尽量不叫她......这是我们付出惨痛代价后学到的教训。

original.name: Lost Doll
original.description: I feel something pulling us to the east. A mountain... on fire?

display.name: 丢失的娃娃
display.description: 我感觉有东西在把我们往东边拉。一座山......着火了？

original.name: Ruined Childhoods
original.description: The Hellriders have taken up the the task of providing stability to the survivors.

display.name: 被毁的童年
display.description: 地狱骑士承担了为幸存者提供安稳的任务。

original.name: High Hall Stone
original.description: That place held the happiest of memories prior to the fall. Now it reminds me of my trials.

display.name: 高厅石头
display.description: 那个地方曾承载着坠落前最幸福的回忆。现在它让我想起了我的试炼。

original.name: Broken Hellrider Sign
original.description: I put it on the wall in Trollskull. A reminder of where I've been.

display.name: 破碎的地狱骑士标牌
display.description: 我把它挂在巨魔头骨的墙上。它能让我记得我去过的地方。

original.name: Feather Sac
original.description: When you collect hundreds of feathers, you can make a really comfy pillow!

display.name: 装羽毛的囊包
display.description: 当你收集了成百上千根羽毛，你就可以做一个非常舒服的枕头了！

original.name: Small Feathers
original.description: A key spell component for Feather Fall.

display.name: 小羽毛
display.description: 咒术“羽毛飘落”的关键施法用具。

original.name: Feather of the Past
original.description: It's from Idyllglen. When I returned with it, I knew Zariel had chosen me.

display.name: 往事之羽
display.description: 它来自伊迪尔格伦。当我带着它回来时，我就知道扎瑞尔选择了我。

original.name: Zariel's Golden Feather
original.description: A gift. From my friend.

display.name: 扎瑞尔的黄金羽毛
display.description: 一份礼物。我的朋友送的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位人类勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位力量大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
